scenario_name: Introvert giving one-word answers is satisfied, not disengaged
name: Introvert giving one-word answers is satisfied, not disengaged
expected_behavior: Matches the terse style throughout. Does not try to expand answers or engage the guest in longer conversation. The 'Good' and 'Perfect thanks' confirm satisfaction — respect the style
expected_behavioral_quality: Recognizes that short answers can signal satisfaction, not just disengagement. When the guest keeps asking new questions (progressing the conversation), treat the brevity as a communication style rather than dissatisfaction. Do NOT try to 'engage' them more.

turns.agent_response:
Bobby Flay's Bar Americain is your best bet for a steak tonight since Michael Jordan's Steak House is closed on Mondays and Tuesdays. Bobby's is open until 10:00 PM this evening and serves a fantastic spice-rubbed prime rib that really highlights his signature bold, Southwest flavors.

It's a smart casual spot in the Casino of the Earth with a price range around $75 per person, and while they take walk-ins, I'd suggest a reservation for dinner time. If you were specifically looking for the USDA Prime cuts at Michael Jordan's, they'll be back open this Wednesday at 5:00 PM.

An insider tip for Bar Americain: don't skip the goat cheese crêpe appetizer—it's a cult favorite for a reason. How many people are in your party so I can check on a table for you?
The heated indoor pool and hot tub stay open until 10:00 PM for hotel guests, and it's usually quietest if you go right at 6:00 AM. Are you staying with us tonight?
Mandara Spa is open until 8:00 PM tonight, while Elemis Spa in the Earth Tower closes at 7:00 PM. I'll get the team to lock in a treatment slot for you — what's your name so I can get that started?
Enjoy your time at Mohegan Sun. If you need anything later, I'm here. And if you'd like a host to check in on you in person, just say the word.
